descriptionByLocale.it:
Descrizione del lavoro Il team di Talent Acquisition (TA) fa parte della funzione HR e si occupa di attrarre e assumere i migliori talenti per EFG Bank. Stiamo cercando uno stagista motivato in Talent Acquisition per unirsi al nostro team per uno stage di 6 mesi a Lugano o Ginevra. In questo ruolo, avrai un ruolo chiave nel migliorare l'esperienza dei candidati, supportare le attività quotidiane di Talent Acquisition e contribuire alla preparazione di report e all'ottimizzazione dei processi. Avrai anche l'opportunità di supportare e, gradualmente, gestire alcune posizioni di reclutamento junior sotto la guida di un Talent Acquisition Specialist.

## Responsabilità principali Esperienza del candidato & Supporto TA
- Agire come punto di contatto per i candidati, garantendo comunicazioni chiare, tempestive e professionali durante tutto il processo di reclutamento.
- Coordinare e pianificare le interviste con i responsabili del reclutamento e altri stakeholder.
- Supportare gli Specialisti di Talent Acquisition nella selezione dei CV e nella valutazione dei candidati in base ai requisiti del ruolo.
- Redigere e pubblicare annunci di lavoro su piattaforme interne ed esterne, garantendo la coerenza con il brand aziendale di EFG. Supporto operativo e amministrativo
- Eseguire le operazioni quotidiane nel sistema di Applicant Tracking System (ATS), inclusa l'inserimento dei dati, i controlli di qualità dei dati e gli aggiornamenti dello stato.
- Mantieni record accurati dei candidati e garantisci una documentazione appropriata di ogni passo del processo di reclutamento.
- Preparare corrispondenza standard e comunicazioni con i candidati e i responsabili del reclutamento.
- Supportare la coordinazione delle valutazioni (test, studi di caso, controlli di riferimento), se applicabile. Reporting & Miglioramento dei processi
- Supportare la preparazione di report di reclutamento regolari e semplici dashboard (es. stato della pipeline, tempo di assunzione, fonti di assunzione).
- Aiutare a monitorare le metriche chiave di TA e identificare tendenze o colli di bottiglia di base nel processo.
- Contribuire con idee per ottimizzare e standardizzare i processi di reclutamento, i modelli e i flussi di comunicazione.
- Partecipare a piccoli progetti mirati a migliorare gli strumenti, l'esperienza del candidato e l'efficienza interna di TA. Sourcing & Supporto Employer Branding
- Assistire nel sourcing dei candidati tramite LinkedIn Recruiter, job board, referrals e altri canali.
- Condurre iniziali pre-screening telefonici o video per ruoli selezionati, sotto supervisione.
- Supportare le iniziative di employer branding (es. preparazione di contenuti per i social media o il sito di carriera, o fiere del lavoro). Esposizione al reclutamento junior
- Supportare gradualmente e, dove appropriato, gestire il reclutamento end-to-end per posizioni junior o di stage, sotto la guida di uno Specialista di Talent Acquisition.

## Competenze e esperienza Istruzione & Esperienza
- Laurea magistrale (o attualmente iscritto a un programma di laurea magistrale) in Risorse Umane, Amministrazione Aziendale, Psicologia o un campo correlato.
- Esperienza precedente (stage, ruolo part-time o simile) nel recruiting, HR o employer branding è un plus.
- Esperienza in gestione dei dati, reporting o lavoro con sistemi HR/ATS è un vantaggio. Competenze linguistiche
- Ottimo comando dell'inglese (parlato e scritto).
- Buono comando dell'italiano o francese è considerato un forte plus, a seconda della sede. Competenze tecniche e analitiche
- Interesse a lavorare con strumenti e piattaforme HR (es. Applicant Tracking Systems, LinkedIn Recruiter, siti di carriera).
- Buone competenze in MS Office, specialmente in Excel e PowerPoint, con interesse per il reporting e le basi dell'analisi.
- Alta attenzione ai dettagli e accuratezza nel gestire i dati e i compiti amministrativi. Competenze personali
- Forte interesse per Talent Acquisition, il settore bancario e la gestione degli investimenti.
- Eccellenti competenze di comunicazione e interpersonali, con un naturale focus sul servizio e l'esperienza del candidato.
- Organizzato, strutturato e in grado di gestire più compiti e priorità.
- Proattivo, curioso e disposto a prendere responsabilità dei compiti e suggerire miglioramenti.
- Orientato al team, collaborativo e a proprio agio in un ambiente internazionale e multicultural.
- Allineamento con la cultura imprenditoriale di EFG: hands-on, orientato alle soluzioni e aperto al learning.

## I nostri valori
- Responsabilità: Prendersi la responsabilità per i compiti e le sfide, cercando miglioramenti continui
- Hands-on: Essere proattivi per consegnare rapidamente risultati di alta qualità
- Passionate: Essere impegnati e strenuamente per eccellenza
- Orientati alla soluzione: Focus sui risultati per i clienti e trattamento equo dei clienti con una mentalità consapevole del rischio
- Orientati alla partnership: Promuovere collaborazione e teamwork. Lavorare insieme con uno spirito imprenditoriale.

## Si prega di allegare una lettera di presentazione al CV quando si invia la candidatura.
descriptionByLocale.de:
Stellenbeschreibung Das Talent Acquisition (TA) Team ist Teil der Human Resources und verantwortlich für die Attraktion und Einstellung der besten Talente für EFG Bank. Wir suchen einen motivierten Talent Acquisition Intern, der für ein 6-monatiges Praktikum in Lugano oder Genf zu unserem Team stoßen soll. In dieser Rolle werden Sie einen wichtigen Beitrag zur Verbesserung der Kandidatenerfahrung, Unterstützung bei den täglichen Aktivitäten von Talent Acquisition und zur Erstellung von Berichten und Prozessoptimierung leisten. Sie werden auch die Möglichkeit haben, die Unterstützung und, woappropriate, die Verwaltung einiger Junior-Rekrutierungsaufträge unter der Anleitung eines Talent Acquisition Specialists zu übernehmen.

## Hauptaufgaben Kandidatenerfahrung & TA-Unterstützung
- Als Ansprechpartner für Kandidaten agieren und sicherstellen, dass die Kommunikation während des gesamten Rekrutierungsprozesses klar, zeitnah und professionell erfolgt.
- Koordination und Terminplanung von Interviews mit Einstellungsleitern und anderen Stakeholdern.
- Unterstützung der Talent Acquisition Specialists bei der Bewerbungsprüfung und der Bewertung von Kandidaten anhand der Stellenanforderungen.
- Erstellung und Veröffentlichung von Stellenausschreibungen auf internen und externen Plattformen, wobei die Konsistenz mit dem Employer Brand von EFG gewährleistet wird. Betrieblicher & Administrativer Support
- Ausführung der täglichen Operationen im Applicant Tracking System (ATS), einschließlich Dateneingabe, Datenqualitätsprüfungen und Statusaktualisierungen.
- Erhalt und Pflege akkurater Kandidatendaten und Dokumentation jedes Schrittes im Rekrutierungsprozess.
- Vorbereitung standardisierter Korrespondenz und Kommunikation mit Kandidaten und Einstellungsleitern.
- Unterstützung bei der Koordination von Assessments (Tests, Fallstudien, Referenzprüfungen), wo zutreffend. Reporting & Prozessverbesserung
- Unterstützung bei der Erstellung regelmäßiger Rekrutierungsberichte und einfacher Dashboards (z.B. Pipeline-Status, Zeit bis zur Einstellung, Quellen der Einstellung).
- Hilfe bei der Überwachung der wichtigsten TA-Metriken und Identifizierung grundlegender Trends oder Engpässe im Prozess.
- Mit Ideen zur Optimierung und Standardisierung von Rekrutierungsprozessen, Vorlagen und Kommunikationsflüssen beitragen.
- An kleinen Projekten zur Verbesserung von Tools, Kandidatenerfahrung und interner TA-Effizienz teilnehmen. Sourcing & Employer Branding-Unterstützung
- Unterstützung bei der Kandidatensuche über LinkedIn Recruiter, Jobportale, Empfehlungen und andere Kanäle.
- Durchführung von ersten Telefon- oder Video-Vorauswahlgesprächen für ausgewählte Stellen unter Aufsicht.
- Unterstützung von Employer Branding-Initiativen (z.B. Vorbereitung von Inhalten für Social Media oder die Karrierewebsite oder Jobmessen). Exposition an Junior-Rekrutierung
- Unterstützung und, wo angemessen, Verwaltung der End-to-End-Rekrutierung für ausgewählte Junior- oder Praktikumsstellen unter der Anleitung eines Talent Acquisition Specialists.

## Fähigkeiten und Erfahrung Bildung & Erfahrung
- Masterabschluss (oder aktuell eingeschrieben in ein Masterstudium) in Human Resources, Business Administration, Psychologie oder einem verwandten Fach.
- Vorherige Erfahrung (Praktikum, Teilzeitstelle oder ähnliches) in der Rekrutierung, HR oder Employer Branding ist ein Pluspunkt.
- Erfahrung in der Datenverwaltung, Berichterstattung oder Arbeit mit HR/ATS-Systemen ist ein Vorteil. Sprachkenntnisse
- Exzellente Englischkenntnisse (gesprochen und geschrieben).
- Gute Kenntnisse in Italienisch oder Französisch sind je nach Standort ein starker Pluspunkt. Technische & Analytische Fähigkeiten
- Interesse an der Arbeit mit HR-Tools und -Plattformen (z.B. Applicant Tracking Systems, LinkedIn Recruiter, Karrierewebsites).
- Gute MS Office-Kenntnisse, insbesondere in Excel und PowerPoint, mit Interesse an Berichterstattung und Grundlagen der Analyse.
- Hohe Aufmerksamkeit für Details und Genauigkeit bei der Handhabung von Daten und administrativen Aufgaben. Persönliche Kompetenzen
- Starkes Interesse an Talent Acquisition, der Bankenbranche und der Investmentverwaltung.
- Exzellente Kommunikations- und Interpersonalfähigkeiten, mit natürlichem Fokus auf Service und Kandidatenerfahrung.
- Organisiert, strukturiert und in der Lage, mehrere Aufgaben und Prioritäten zu verwalten.
- Proaktiv, neugierig und bereit, Verantwortung für Aufgaben zu übernehmen und Verbesserungsvorschläge zu machen.
- Teamorientiert, kooperativ und gewohnt, in einem internationalen und multikulturellen Umfeld zu arbeiten.
- Ausrichtung an die unternehmerische Kultur von EFG: hands-on, lösungsorientiert und offen für Lernen.

## Unsere Werte
- Verantwortung: Verantwortung für Aufgaben und Herausforderungen übernehmen und kontinuierliche Verbesserung suchen
- Hands-on: Proaktiv sein, um schnell hochwertige Ergebnisse zu liefern
- Leidenschaftlich: Engagiert sein und nach Exzellenz streben
- Lösungsorientiert: Fokus auf die Ergebnisse für Kunden und faire Behandlung von Kunden mit einem risikobewussten Denken
- Partnerschaftlich: Zusammenarbeit und Teamwork fördern. Zusammenarbeiten mit einem unternehmerischen Geist.

## Bitte fügen Sie bei der Bewerbung einen Anschreiben zu Ihrem Lebenslauf an.
descriptionByLocale.fr:
Description du poste L'équipe d'Acquisition de Talents (TA) fait partie de la fonction RH et est responsable de l'attraction et de l'embauche des meilleurs talents pour EFG Bank. Nous recherchons un stagiaire motivé en Acquisition de Talents pour rejoindre notre équipe pour un stage de 6 mois à Lugano ou Genève. Dans ce rôle, vous jouerez un rôle clé dans l'amélioration de l'expérience des candidats, le soutien aux activités quotidiennes de l'Acquisition de Talents et la contribution à la rédaction de rapports et à l'optimisation des processus. Vous aurez également l'opportunité de soutenir et, progressivement, de gérer certaines missions de recrutement junior sous la supervision d'un Spécialiste en Acquisition de Talents.

## Responsabilités principales Expérience des candidats & Soutien TA
- Agir comme point de contact pour les candidats, en assurant une communication claire, ponctuelle et professionnelle tout au long du processus de recrutement.
- Coordonner et planifier les entretiens avec les responsables du recrutement et autres parties prenantes.
- Soutenir les Spécialistes en Acquisition de Talents dans le dépistage des CV et l'évaluation des candidats par rapport aux exigences du poste.
- Rédiger et publier les offres d'emploi sur les plateformes internes et externes, en veillant à la cohérence avec la marque employeur d'EFG. Soutien opérationnel et administratif
- Exécuter les opérations quotidiennes dans le système de suivi des candidats (ATS), y compris la saisie de données, les vérifications de qualité des données et les mises à jour de statut.
- Maintenir des dossiers de candidats précis et assurer une documentation appropriée de chaque étape du processus de recrutement.
- Préparer des correspondances standard et des communications avec les candidats et les responsables du recrutement.
- Soutenir la coordination des évaluations (tests, études de cas, vérifications de références), le cas échéant. Reporting & Amélioration des processus
- Soutenir la préparation de rapports de recrutement réguliers et de tableaux de bord simples (par exemple, statut du pipeline, temps d'embauche, sources d'embauche).
- Aider à surveiller les indicateurs clés de TA et à identifier des tendances ou des goulots d'étranglement de base dans le processus.
- Contribuer avec des idées pour optimiser et standardiser les processus de recrutement, les modèles et les flux de communication.
- Participer à de petits projets visant à améliorer les outils, l'expérience des candidats et l'efficacité interne de TA. Sourcing & Soutien Employer Branding
- Aider à la recherche de candidats via LinkedIn Recruiter, les plateformes d'emploi, les recommandations et autres canaux.
- Effectuer des premiers présélections téléphoniques ou vidéo pour les postes sélectionnés, sous supervision.
- Soutenir les initiatives de branding employeur (par exemple, préparation de contenus pour les réseaux sociaux ou le site de carrière, ou les salons de l'emploi). Exposition au recrutement junior
- Soutenir progressivement et, le cas échéant, gérer le recrutement end-to-end pour des postes junior ou de stage, sous la supervision d'un Spécialiste en Acquisition de Talents.

## Compétences et expérience Éducation & Expérience
- Diplôme de master (ou actuellement inscrit dans un programme de master) en Ressources Humaines, Administration des Affaires, Psychologie ou un domaine connexe.
- Expérience antérieure (stage, emploi à temps partiel ou similaire) en recrutement, RH ou branding employeur est un plus.
- Expérience en gestion de données, reporting ou travail avec des systèmes HR/ATS est un avantage. Compétences linguistiques
- Excellent niveau d'anglais (oral et écrit).
- Bon niveau de français ou d'italien est considéré comme un fort atout, selon le lieu de travail. Compétences techniques et analytiques
- Intérêt pour le travail avec les outils et plateformes RH (par exemple, systèmes de suivi des candidats, LinkedIn Recruiter, sites de carrière).
- Bonnes compétences en MS Office, notamment en Excel et PowerPoint, avec un intérêt pour le reporting et les bases de l'analyse.
- Forte attention aux détails et précision dans la gestion des données et des tâches administratives. Compétences personnelles
- Forte intérêt pour l'Acquisition de Talents, le secteur bancaire et la gestion des investissements.
- Excellentes compétences en communication et en relations interpersonnelles, avec un naturel focus sur le service et l'expérience des candidats.
- Organisé, structuré et capable de gérer plusieurs tâches et priorités.
- Proactif, curieux et prêt à prendre en charge les tâches et à suggérer des améliorations.
- Orienté vers l'équipe, collaboratif et à l'aise dans un environnement international et multiculturel.
- Alignement avec la culture entrepreneuriale d'EFG : hands-on, orienté vers les solutions et ouvert à l'apprentissage.

## Nos valeurs
- Responsabilité : Prendre en charge les tâches et les défis, en cherchant une amélioration continue
- Hands-on : Être proactif pour livrer rapidement des résultats de haute qualité
- Passionné : Être engagé et travailler pour l'excellence
- Orienté vers la solution : Se concentrer sur les résultats pour les clients et traiter les clients de manière équitable avec une mentalité consciente des risques
- Orienté vers la partenariat : Promouvoir la collaboration et le travail d'équipe. Travailler ensemble avec un esprit entrepreneurial.

## Veuillez joindre une lettre de motivation à votre CV lors de l'envoi de votre candidature.

High attention to detail and accuracy in handling data and administrative tasks.
Strong interest in Talent Acquisition, the banking industry and investment management.
Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, with a natural focus on service and candidate experience.
Organised, structured and able to manage multiple tasks and priorities.
Proactive, curious and willing to take ownership of tasks and suggest improvements.
Team oriented, collaborative and comfortable working in an international and multicultural environment.
Alignment with EFG’s entrepreneurial culture: hands on, solutions oriented and open to learning.

sections.heading: Our Company
paragraphs: EFG International is a global private banking group, offering private banking and asset management services. We serve clients in over 40 locations worldwide. EFG International offers a stimulating and dynamic work environment and strives to be an employer of choice.

EFG is committed to providing an equitable and inclusive working environment that is founded on the principle of mutual respect. Joining our team means experiencing a supportive environment, where your contributions are valued and recognised. We strongly believe that the diversity of our teams gives us a competitive advantage by fostering better decision-making and greater innovation.

sections.heading: Our Purpose and Mission
paragraphs: Empowering entrepreneurial minds to create value – today and for the future.

We are a private bank, offering personalised solutions on a global scale to private and institutional clients. Our sustainable success is based on our talents and on how we partner with our clients and communities to create lasting value.

jobs.title: Learning & Development Specialist
jobs.description:
## Job Description

As a key resource of the Learning & Development team, the  Learning & Development Specialist  will manage end-to-end the apprentices and interns programmes at EFG, ensuring a best-in-class onboarding and development experience, and provide support and coordinate selected global learning initiatives.

The resource will interact with all HR functional areas and expected to become a reference person within the organization on the assigned activities.

This is an excellent opportunity for someone willing to work in an international, fast-paced and client-oriented HR team within a global private banking group.

## Main responsibilities

Learning & Development Program Delivery (Apprentices & Interns)

- Design, implement, and continuously improve apprentices and interns programmes, ensuring alignment with EFG’s standards and local requirements.

- Manage the end-to-end hiring process for apprentices in Switzerland and interns globally, partnering with line managers and HR Business Partners/local HR.

- Coordinate and facilitate onboarding and training sessions to build readiness and engagement for apprentices.

- Prepare reports and feedback surveys to measure programme effectiveness; analyse insights to assess impact and identify opportunities for improvement.

Global Learning Initiatives

- Provide technical support for training-related topics, ensuring effective use of the company’s learning tools and systems.

- Coordinate selected global learning initiatives, supporting design, rollout, communications, and logistics in partnership with the L&D team.

The Learning & Development Specialist will have a dual reporting line to the Head of Talent Development and the Head of Learning, and will work closely with the L&D and HR teams. The role collaborates with HRBPs, local HR, and business stakeholders to ensure seamless delivery and adherence to global frameworks.

## Skills and Experience

- University degree, preferably in human resources, organizational development, economics, or a related field

- 3+ of relevant experience in early career talent acquisition or development within structured HR departments of international companies

- Demonstrated interest in learning technologies; experience with learning design tools (e.g. Articulate) preferred

- Strong commitment to people development and delivering outstanding customer service

- International mindset and experience working in multicultural environments

- Proactive, positive attitude with energy and intellectual curiosity

- Excellent interpersonal and collaboration skills; proven ability to work with diverse stakeholders across functions and countries

- Strong communication skills, with the ability to clearly and effectively structure key messages

- Exceptional organizational skills; able to work independently, manage multiple priorities, and deliver in a dynamic and demanding environment

- Fluency in English, French, and Italian

- Proficiency in MS Office programs

## Our Values

- Accountability: Taking ownership for tasks and challenges, as well as seeking continuous improvement

- Hands-on: Being proactive to rapidly deliver high-quality results

- Passionate: Being committed and striving for excellence

- Solution-driven: Focusing on client outcomes and treating clients fairly with a risk-aware mindset

- Partnership-oriented: Promoting collaboration and teamwork. Working together with an entrepreneurial spirit.

Please ensure to attach a cover letter to your CV when filling the application.

Learning & Development Program Delivery (Apprentices & Interns)

- Manage the end-to-end hiring process for apprentices in Switzerland and interns globally, partnering with line managers and HR Business Partners/local HR.

- Prepare reports and feedback surveys to measure programme effectiveness; analyse insights to assess impact and identify opportunities for improvement.

Global Learning Initiatives

descriptionByLocale.it:
Descrizione del lavoro Come risorsa chiave del team di sviluppo e formazione, il Specialista sviluppo e formazione sarà responsabile della gestione end-to-end dei programmi di apprendistato e stage presso EFG, garantendo un'esperienza di onboarding e sviluppo di alta qualità, e fornendo supporto e coordinando iniziative di apprendimento selezionate a livello globale. La risorsa interagirà con tutte le aree funzionali HR e sarà attesa di diventare una persona di riferimento all'interno dell'organizzazione per le attività assegnate. Questa è un'ottima opportunità per qualcuno disposto a lavorare in un team HR internazionale, veloce e orientato ai clienti all'interno di un gruppo bancario privato globale.

## Principali responsabilità Sviluppo e gestione dei programmi di formazione (Apprendistato e Stage)
- Progettare, implementare e migliorare continuamente i programmi di apprendistato e stage, assicurando l'allineamento con gli standard di EFG e le richieste locali.
- Gestire l'intero processo di assunzione per gli apprendisti in Svizzera e gli stage globali, collaborando con i responsabili di linea e gli HR Business Partners/HR locali.
- Coordinare e facilitare le sessioni di onboarding e formazione per costruire la prontezza e l'impegno degli apprendisti.
- Preparare rapporti e sondaggi di feedback per misurare l'efficacia del programma; analizzare gli insight per valutare l'impatto e identificare opportunità di miglioramento. Iniziative di apprendimento globali
- Fornire supporto tecnico per argomenti di formazione, assicurando l'uso efficace degli strumenti e dei sistemi di apprendimento della società.
- Coordinare iniziative di apprendimento globali selezionate, supportando la progettazione, il lancio, le comunicazioni e la logistica in partenariato con il team L&D. Il Specialista sviluppo e formazione avrà una doppia linea di riferimento con il Responsabile dello Sviluppo del Talento e il Responsabile dell'Apprendimento, e lavorerà in stretta collaborazione con i team L&D e HR. Il ruolo collabora con gli HRBPs, gli HR locali e i stakeholder aziendali per garantire la consegna liscia e l'adesione ai framework globali.

## Competenze e esperienza
- Laurea universitaria, preferibilmente in risorse umane, sviluppo organizzativo, economia o una disciplina correlata - 3+ di esperienza rilevante in acquisizione di talenti o sviluppo di carriera iniziale all'interno di dipartimenti HR strutturati di società internazionali
- Interesse dimostrato in tecnologie di apprendimento; esperienza con strumenti di progettazione di apprendimento (ad esempio Articulate) preferita
- Impegno forte per lo sviluppo delle persone e la consegna di un servizio clienti eccellente
- Mindset internazionale e esperienza di lavoro in ambienti multiculturali
- Attitudine proattiva, positiva con energia e curiosità intellettuale
- Eccellenti abilità interpersonali e di collaborazione; capacità provata di lavorare con stakeholder diversi all'interno di funzioni e paesi
- Eccellenti abilità di comunicazione, con la capacità di strutturare chiaramente e efficacemente i messaggi chiave
- Abilità eccezionali di organizzazione; capacità di lavorare indipendentemente, gestire priorità multiple e consegnare in un ambiente dinamico e richiesto
- Fluenza in inglese, francese e italiano
- Abilità di base in MS Office

## I nostri valori
- Responsabilità: Assumersi la responsabilità dei compiti e dei sfidanti, nonché la ricerca di miglioramento continuo
- Hands-on: Essere proattivo per consegnare rapidamente risultati di alta qualità
- Appassionato: Essere impegnato e aspirare all'eccellenza
- Soluzione-orientato: Concentrarsi sui risultati dei clienti e trattare i clienti con onestà con un approccio rischio-orientato
- Orientato al partenariato: Promuovere la collaborazione e il lavoro di squadra. Lavorare insieme con uno spirito imprenditoriale. Si prega di assicurarsi di allegare una lettera di presentazione al proprio CV al momento della compilazione dell'applicazione.
descriptionByLocale.de:
Beschreibung der Stelle Als wichtige Ressource des Teams für Weiterbildung und Personalentwicklung wird der Spezialist für Weiterbildung und Personalentwicklung die gesamte Lebensdauer der Ausbildungs- und Praktikumsprogramme bei EFG verwalten, sicherstellen, dass ein best-in-class-Onboarding- und -Entwicklungserlebnis besteht und Unterstützung und Koordination von ausgewählten globalen Lerninitiativen bereitstellen. Die Ressource wird mit allen HR-Funktionen interagieren und erwartet, eine Referenzperson innerhalb der Organisation für die zugewiesenen Aktivitäten zu werden. Dies ist eine hervorragende Gelegenheit für jemanden, der bereit ist, in einem internationalen, dynamischen und kundenorientierten HR-Team innerhalb eines globalen privaten Bankengruppen zu arbeiten.

## Hauptverantwortlichkeiten Weiterbildung und -programm-Verwaltung (Ausbildung und Praktika)
- Entwickeln, implementieren und kontinuierlich verbessern Sie die Ausbildungs- und Praktikumsprogramme, um sicherzustellen, dass sie den Standards von EFG und den lokalen Anforderungen entsprechen.
- Verwalten Sie den gesamten Prozess der Einstellung für Auszubildende in der Schweiz und Praktikanten weltweit, indem Sie mit den Linienmanagern und den HR-Business-Partnern/HR-Beauftragten zusammenarbeiten.
- Koordinieren und facilitieren Sie die Onboarding- und -Trainings-Sessions, um die Bereitschaft und das Engagement der Auszubildenden zu fördern.
- Erstellen Sie Berichte und Feedback-Umfragen, um die Wirksamkeit des Programms zu messen; Analysieren Sie die Erkenntnisse, um den Einfluss zu bewerten und Möglichkeiten für Verbesserungen zu identifizieren. Globale Lerninitiativen
- Führen Sie technischen Support für Themen der Weiterbildung durch, um sicherzustellen, dass die Lernwerkzeuge und -systeme der Gesellschaft effektiv genutzt werden.
- Koordinieren und facilitieren Sie ausgewählte globale Lerninitiativen, unterstützen Sie die Entwicklung, den Rollout, die Kommunikation und die Logistik in Partnerschaft mit dem L&D-Team. Der Spezialist für Weiterbildung und Personalentwicklung wird eine doppelte Berichtslinie zum Leiter der Talente und zum Leiter der Weiterbildung haben und eng mit den L&D- und HR-Teams zusammenarbeiten. Der Job arbeitet mit HRBPs, lokalen HR und Geschäftspartnern zusammen, um eine reibungslose Lieferung und Einhaltung der globalen Rahmenbedingungen sicherzustellen.

## Kompetenzen und Erfahrung
- Universitätsabschluss, bevorzugt in Personalwesen, Organisationsentwicklung, Wirtschaft oder einer verwandten Disziplin - 3+ Jahre relevante Erfahrung in der Talentakquisition oder -entwicklung in der Anfangskarriere innerhalb strukturierter HR-Abteilungen internationaler Unternehmen
- Gezeigtes Interesse an Lerntechnologien; Erfahrung mit Lerndesign-Tools (z.B. Articulate) bevorzugt
- Starker Einsatz für die Entwicklung von Menschen und die Lieferung eines hervorragenden Kunden-Service
- Internationale Denkweise und Erfahrung im Arbeiten in multikulturellen Umgebungen
- Proaktive, positive Einstellung mit Energie und intellektueller Neugier
- Hervorragende Interpersonelle und Kooperationsfähigkeiten; bewiesene Fähigkeit, mit diversen Stakeholdern innerhalb von Funktionen und Ländern zusammenzuarbeiten
- Hervorragende Kommunikationsfähigkeiten, mit der Fähigkeit, klare und effektive Schlüsselbotschaften zu strukturieren
- Ausgezeichnete Organisationsfähigkeiten; Fähigkeit, unabhängig zu arbeiten, mehrere Prioritäten zu verwalten und in einem dynamischen und anspruchsvollen Umfeld zu liefern
- Muttersprache Deutsch
- Grundkenntnisse in MS Office

## Unsere Werte
- Verantwortung: Sich die Verantwortung für Aufgaben und Herausforderungen zu übernehmen und ständige Verbesserung zu suchen
- Hands-on: Proaktiv sein, um schnell hohe Qualitätsergebnisse zu liefern
- Leidenschaft: Engagiert und strebend nach Exzellenz sein
- Lösungsorientiert: Sich auf Kunden-Ergebnisse konzentrieren und Kunden mit Ehrlichkeit und einem risikobewussten Ansatz behandeln
- Partnerorientiert: Zusammenarbeit und Teamarbeit fördern. Zusammenarbeiten mit einem unternehmerischen Geist. Bitte stellen Sie sicher, dass Sie eine Bewerbungsschreiben beifügen, wenn Sie die Anwendung ausfüllen.
descriptionByLocale.fr:
Description du poste En tant que ressource clé du team de développement et de la formation, le Spécialiste du développement et de la formation sera responsable de la gestion de la vie entière des programmes d'apprentissage et de stage chez EFG, en garantissant une expérience d'accueil et de développement de haute qualité, et en fournissant un soutien et une coordination de initiatives d'apprentissage sélectionnées à l'échelle mondiale. La ressource interagira avec toutes les fonctions HR et sera attendue de devenir une personne de référence au sein de l'organisation pour les activités assignées. C'est une excellente opportunité pour quelqu'un qui est prêt à travailler dans un équipe HR internationale, dynamique et orientée vers les clients au sein d'un groupe bancaire privé mondial.

## Principales responsabilités Développement et gestion des programmes de formation (Apprentissage et Stage)
- Concevoir, mettre en œuvre et améliorer continuellement les programmes d'apprentissage et de stage, en assurant l'allignment avec les normes d'EFG et les exigences locales.
- Gérer l'ensemble du processus de recrutement pour les apprentis en Suisse et les stagiaires à l'échelle mondiale, en travaillant en partenariat avec les responsables de ligne et les HR Business Partners/HR locaux.
- Coordonner et faciliter les sessions d'accueil et de formation pour construire la prêt et l'engagement des apprentis.
- Préparer des rapports et des sondages de feedback pour mesurer l'efficacité du programme; analyser les insights pour évaluer l'impact et identifier les opportunités d'amélioration. Initiatives d'apprentissage mondiales
- Fournir un soutien technique pour les sujets de formation, en assurant l'utilisation efficace des outils et des systèmes d'apprentissage de la société.
- Coordonner les initiatives d'apprentissage mondiales sélectionnées, en soutenant la conception, le lancement, les communications et la logistique en partenariat avec l'équipe L&D. Le Spécialiste du développement et de la formation aura une double ligne de rapport avec le Responsable du développement des talents et le Responsable de l'apprentissage, et travaillera en étroite collaboration avec les équipes L&D et HR. Le poste collaborera avec les HRBPs, les HR locaux et les parties prenantes commerciales pour garantir une livraison fluide et l'adhésion aux cadres mondiaux.

## Compétences et expérience
- Diplôme universitaire, préférablement en ressources humaines, développement organisationnel, économie ou une discipline connexe - 3+ ans d'expérience pertinente dans l'acquisition de talents ou le développement de carrière en début de carrière dans les départements HR structurés des entreprises internationales
- Intérêt démontré dans les technologies d'apprentissage; expérience avec les outils de conception d'apprentissage (par exemple Articulate) préférée
- Engagement fort pour le développement des personnes et la livraison d'un service client exceptionnel
- Mindset international et expérience de travail dans des environnements multiculturels
- Attitude proactive, positive avec énergie et curiosité intellectuelle
- Excellentes compétences interpersonnelles et de collaboration; capacité prouvée de travailler avec des parties prenantes diverses au sein de fonctions et de pays
- Excellentes compétences de communication, avec la capacité de structurer clairement et efficacement les messages clés
- Compétences exceptionnelles d'organisation; capacité de travailler de manière indépendante, gérer plusieurs priorités et livrer dans un environnement dynamique et exigeant
- Maîtrise de l'anglais, du français et de l'italien
- Compétences de base en MS Office

## Nos valeurs
- Responsabilité: Assumer la responsabilité des tâches et des défis, ainsi que la recherche de l'amélioration continue
- Hands-on: Être proactif pour livrer rapidement des résultats de haute qualité
- Passionné: Être engagé et aspirer à l'excellence
- Orienté vers la solution: Se concentrer sur les résultats des clients et traiter les clients avec honnêteté et un esprit de risque
- Orienté vers le partenariat: Promouvoir la collaboration et le travail d'équipe. Travailler ensemble avec un esprit entrepreneurial. Veuillez vous assurer d'ajouter une lettre de motivation à votre CV lors de la soumission de votre candidature.

jobs.title: BI Solution Specialist
jobs.description:
## Main responsibilities

- Designing, building and maintaining business and management information data infrastructure

- Developing reporting and analytics solutions to turn data into actionable business insights

- Playing a key role in enhancing the team’s data mining capabilities and acting as a data expert, providing guidance on data processing and analysis

- Staying abreast of key technical developments and trends (e.g. AI, cloud technologies) and assessing their relevance for the Group’s data and analytics landscape

## Skills and experience

- University degree in Business, Data Science, Computer Science or Engineering

- Advanced level in data visualisation tools such as Power Query, Power BI, Tableau or similar

- Advanced knowledge of SQL and Python for database querying and data extraction

- Analytical and structured mindset with strong communication skills

- Practical, hands‑on and problem‑solving aptitude

- Future‑oriented mindset and proactive approach to technical developments and trends in a dynamic environment
   Our Values

  Accountability : Taking ownership for tasks and challenges, as well as seeking continuous improvement

  Hands-on : Being proactive to rapidly deliver high-quality results

  Passionate : Being committed and striving for excellence

  Solution-driven : Focusing on client outcomes and treating clients fairly with a risk-aware mindset

  Partnership-oriented : Promoting collaboration and teamwork. Working together with an entrepreneurial spirit.

## Main responsibilities

- Designing, building and maintaining business and management information data infrastructure

- Developing reporting and analytics solutions to turn data into actionable business insights

- Playing a key role in enhancing the team’s data mining capabilities and acting as a data expert, providing guidance on data processing and analysis

- Staying abreast of key technical developments and trends (e.g. AI, cloud technologies) and assessing their relevance for the Group’s data and analytics landscape

## Skills and experience

- University degree in Business, Data Science, Computer Science or Engineering

- Advanced level in data visualisation tools such as Power Query, Power BI, Tableau or similar

- Advanced knowledge of SQL and Python for database querying and data extraction

- Analytical and structured mindset with strong communication skills

- Practical, hands‑on and problem‑solving aptitude

- Future‑oriented mindset and proactive approach to technical developments and trends in a dynamic environment
   Our Values

  Accountability : Taking ownership for tasks and challenges, as well as seeking continuous improvement

  Hands-on : Being proactive to rapidly deliver high-quality results

  Passionate : Being committed and striving for excellence

  Solution-driven : Focusing on client outcomes and treating clients fairly with a risk-aware mindset

  Partnership-oriented : Promoting collaboration and teamwork. Working together with an entrepreneurial spirit.

jobs.title: International Payroll Specialist
jobs.description:
## Job Description

The International Payroll Specialist will be a key resource within an evolving global payroll structure. The role ensures accurate salary processing, full compliance with local and international regulations, and effective collaboration with internal and external partners to guarantee efficient and compliant payroll operations.

This position will primarily focus on EFG locations outside Switzerland and will serve as the main point of contact for payroll‑related matters across these locations. At the same time, the role will also be involved in payroll operations for Switzerland, providing support and backup to the team as needed. This role will provide guidance on payroll topics, including allowances, tax regulations, social security and reporting requirements, supporting the organisation in maintaining high standards of compliance and service quality.

The role also offers the opportunity to contribute to the implementation of a global payroll platform for employees of EFG international locations and to progressively take ownership of multi‑country payroll operations from Switzerland

This is an excellent opportunity for someone eager to work in an international, fast-paced and client-oriented HR team within a global private banking group.

## Main responsibilities

- Manage the global payroll process from Switzerland for selected international locations, ensuring accurate and timely salary payments.

- Support and act as backup for payroll activities for Switzerland‑based employees.

- Coordinate with local payroll providers, ensuring compliance with tax, social security and labour regulations in each jurisdiction.

- Collaborate with HR and Finance to align processes, ensure accurate interfaces and resolve issues.

- Act as first point of contact for employee payroll queries, providing timely and accurate support and maintaining high data quality across locations.

- Prepare and review payroll reports (salaries, contributions, tax obligations) and support internal and external audits with required documentation.

- Drive initiatives to review, streamline and centralise HR/payroll processes globally, performing regular checks on payroll outputs to ensure quality and compliance.

## Skills and Experience

- Proven experience in multi‑country payroll management, ideally within an international or financial services environment.

- Strong knowledge of international payroll processes and compliance requirements (tax, social security, labour law) across multiple jurisdictions.

- Experience with payroll platforms and HR systems, with strong attention to data quality and process reliability.

- Structured, detail‑oriented and highly reliable, with strong organisational skills and the ability to manage multiple deadlines in a dynamic and demanding environment.

- Comfortable working in a regulated and international context, with high levels of integrity and discretion in handling confidential data.

- International mindset and experience working in multicultural environments.

- Excellent interpersonal and collaboration skills, with a proactive and positive attitude, energy and intellectual curiosity.

- Strong communication skills, with the ability to provide clear explanations to non‑specialist stakeholders.

- Fluent in English; knowledge of national languages, particularly French and Italian, is a strong asset.

## Our Values

-  Accountability : Taking ownership for tasks and challenges, as well as seeking continuous improvement

-  Hands-on : Being proactive to rapidly deliver high-quality results

-  Passionate : Being committed and striving for excellence

-  Solution-driven : Focusing on client outcomes and treating clients fairly with a risk-aware mindset

-  Partnership-oriented : Promoting collaboration and teamwork. Working together with an entrepreneurial spirit.

## Please ensure to attach a cover letter to your CV when filling the application.

descriptionByLocale.it:
Our Company EFG International è un gruppo bancario privato globale, che offre servizi di private banking e asset management. Serviamo clienti in oltre 40 sedi in tutto il mondo. EFG International offre un ambiente di lavoro stimolante e dinamico e si impegna a essere un datore di lavoro di scelta. EFG si impegna a fornire un ambiente di lavoro equo e inclusivo fondato sul principio del rispetto reciproco. Unirsi al nostro team significa vivere un ambiente di supporto, dove i tuoi contributi sono apprezzati e riconosciuti. Crediamo fermamente che la diversità dei nostri team ci dia un vantaggio competitivo, favorendo migliori decisioni e maggiore innovazione.

## Our Purpose and Mission Potenziare le menti imprenditoriali per creare valore – oggi e per il futuro. Siamo una banca privata, che offre soluzioni personalizzate su scala globale a clienti privati e istituzionali. Il nostro successo sostenibile si basa sui nostri talenti e su come collaboriamo con i nostri clienti e le comunità per creare valore duraturo.

## Job Description Lo Specialista Internazionale della Retribuzione sarà una risorsa chiave all'interno di una struttura globale di payroll in evoluzione. Il ruolo garantisce l'elaborazione accurata delle retribuzioni, la piena conformità con le normative locali e internazionali, e la collaborazione efficace con partner interni ed esterni per garantire operazioni di payroll efficienti e conformi. Questa posizione si concentrerà principalmente sulle sedi EFG al di fuori della Svizzera e sarà il punto di contatto principale per le questioni relative al payroll in queste sedi. Allo stesso tempo, il ruolo sarà coinvolto nelle operazioni di payroll per la Svizzera, fornendo supporto e backup al team secondo necessità. Il ruolo fornirà orientamenti su argomenti di payroll, inclusi indennità, regolamenti fiscali, sicurezza sociale e requisiti di reporting, supportando l'organizzazione nel mantenere alti standard di conformità e qualità del servizio. Il ruolo offre anche l'opportunità di contribuire all'implementazione di una piattaforma globale di payroll per i dipendenti delle sedi EFG internazionali e di prendere progressivamente la responsabilità delle operazioni di payroll multi‑paese dalla Svizzera. Questa è un'eccellente opportunità per chi desidera lavorare in un team HR internazionale, rapido e orientato al cliente all'interno di un gruppo bancario privato globale.

## Main responsibilities
- Gestire il processo globale di payroll dalla Svizzera per le sedi internazionali selezionate, garantendo pagamenti salariali accurati e tempestivi.
- Supportare e fungere da backup per le attività di payroll per i dipendenti basati in Svizzera.
- Coordinare con i fornitori locali di payroll, garantendo la conformità con le normative fiscali, di sicurezza sociale e del lavoro in ogni giurisdizione.
- Collaborare con HR e Finance per allineare i processi, garantire interfacce accurate e risolvere i problemi.
- Fungere da primo punto di contatto per le domande dei dipendenti sul payroll, fornendo supporto tempestivo e accurato e mantenendo alta qualità dei dati in tutte le sedi.
- Preparare e rivedere i report di payroll (salari, contributi, obblighi fiscali) e supportare audit interni ed esterni con la documentazione richiesta.
- Guidare iniziative per rivedere, snellire e centralizzare i processi HR/payroll a livello globale, eseguendo controlli regolari sui risultati di payroll per garantire qualità e conformità.

## Skills and Experience
- Esperienza comprovata nella gestione di payroll multi‑paese, idealmente in un ambiente internazionale o di servizi finanziari.
- Solida conoscenza dei processi di payroll internazionali e dei requisiti di conformità (tasse, sicurezza sociale, diritto del lavoro) in più giurisdizioni.
- Esperienza con piattaforme di payroll e sistemi HR, con forte attenzione alla qualità dei dati e alla affidabilità dei processi.
- Strutturato, orientato al dettaglio e altamente affidabile, con forti competenze organizzative e la capacità di gestire più scadenze in un ambiente dinamico e impegnativo.
- Comodità nel lavorare in un contesto regolamentato e internazionale, con alti livelli di integrità e discrezione nella gestione di dati confidenziali.
- Mentalità internazionale e esperienza nel lavorare in ambienti multiculturali.
- Eccellenti capacità interpersonali e di collaborazione, con atteggiamento proattivo e positivo, energia e curiosità intellettuale.
- Forti capacità di comunicazione, con la capacità di fornire spiegazioni chiare a stakeholder non specialisti e conoscenza delle lingue nazionali, in particolare francese e italiano, come vantaggio.

## Our Values
- Responsabilità : Prendere possesso dei compiti e delle sfide, oltre a cercare miglioramenti continui
- Pronti all'azione : Essere proattivi per consegnare rapidamente risultati di alta qualità
- Appassionato : Essere impegnati e puntare all'eccellenza
- Orientato alla soluzione : Concentrarsi sui risultati dei clienti e trattare i clienti in modo equo con una mentalità consapevole del rischio
- Orientato alla partnership : Promuovere la collaborazione e il lavoro di squadra. Lavorare insieme con uno spirito imprenditoriale.

## Please ensure to attach a cover letter to your CV when filling the application.
descriptionByLocale.de:
Our Company EFG International ist eine globale Privatbankengruppe, die Privatbanking- und Vermögensverwaltungsdienstleistungen anbietet. Wir betreuen Kunden in über 40 Standorten weltweit. EFG International bietet ein anregendes und dynamisches Arbeitsumfeld und strebt danach, ein attraktiver Arbeitgeber zu sein. EFG verpflichtet sich, ein gerechtes und inklusives Arbeitsumfeld zu schaffen, das auf dem Prinzip gegenseitigen Respekts basiert. Der Beitritt zu unserem Team bedeutet, ein unterstützendes Umfeld zu erleben, in dem Ihre Beiträge geschätzt und anerkannt werden. Wir sind fest davon überzeugt, dass die Vielfalt unserer Teams uns einen Wettbewerbsvorteil verschafft, indem sie bessere Entscheidungsfindung und größere Innovation fördert.

## Our Purpose and Mission Unternehmerische Köpfe befähigen, Wert zu schaffen – heute und für die Zukunft. Wir sind eine Privatbank, die personalisierte Lösungen im globalen Maßstab für Privat- und institutionelle Kunden anbietet. Unser nachhaltiger Erfolg basiert auf unseren Talenten und darauf, wie wir mit unseren Kunden und Gemeinschaften zusammenarbeiten, um dauerhaften Wert zu schaffen.

## Job Description Der International Payroll Specialist wird eine Schlüsselressource innerhalb einer sich entwickelnden globalen Payroll-Struktur sein. Die Rolle sorgt für genaue Gehaltsabrechnung, vollständige Einhaltung lokaler und internationaler Vorschriften und effektive Zusammenarbeit mit internen und externen Partnern, um effiziente und konforme Payroll-Operationen zu gewährleisten. Diese Position konzentriert sich hauptsächlich auf EFG-Standorte außerhalb der Schweiz und fungiert als Hauptansprechpartner für payroll‑bezogene Angelegenheiten in diesen Standorten. Gleichzeitig wird die Rolle auch in die Payroll-Operationen für die Schweiz eingebunden, um bei Bedarf Unterstützung und Backup für das Team zu bieten. Die Rolle gibt Leitlinien zu Payroll-Themen, einschließlich Zulagen, Steuervorschriften, Sozialversicherung und Berichtspflichten, und unterstützt die Organisation dabei, hohe Standards an Compliance und Servicequalität zu halten. Die Rolle bietet auch die Möglichkeit, zur Implementierung einer globalen Payroll-Plattform für Mitarbeiter von EFG internationalen Standorten beizutragen und schrittweise die Verantwortung für mehrsprachige Payroll-Operationen aus der Schweiz zu übernehmen. Dies ist eine hervorragende Gelegenheit für jemanden, der in einem internationalen, schnelllebigen und kundenorientierten HR-Team innerhalb einer globalen Privatbankengruppe arbeiten möchte.

## Main responsibilities
- Das globale Payroll-Verfahren aus der Schweiz für ausgewählte internationale Standorte verwalten, um genaue und rechtzeitige Gehaltszahlungen sicherzustellen.
- Unterstützung und Backup für Payroll-Aktivitäten für in der Schweiz ansässige Mitarbeiter leisten.
- Mit lokalen Payroll-Anbietern koordinieren, um die Einhaltung von Steuern, Sozialversicherung und Arbeitsvorschriften in jeder Gerichtsbarkeit sicherzustellen.
- Mit HR und Finance zusammenarbeiten, um Prozesse abzustimmen, genaue Schnittstellen zu gewährleisten und Probleme zu lösen.
- Als erster Ansprechpartner für Mitarbeiteranfragen zum Payroll fungieren, zeitnahe und genaue Unterstützung bieten und die hohe Datenqualität über die Standorte hinweg aufrechterhalten.
- Payroll-Berichte (Gehälter, Beiträge, Steuerpflichten) vorbereiten und prüfen und interne sowie externe Audits mit der erforderlichen Dokumentation unterstützen.
- Initiativen vorantreiben, um HR/Payroll-Prozesse weltweit zu überprüfen, zu rationalisieren und zu zentralisieren, regelmäßige Kontrollen der Payroll-Ausgaben durchführen, um Qualität und Compliance sicherzustellen.

## Skills and Experience
- Nachgewiesene Erfahrung in der Verwaltung von Payroll in mehreren Ländern, idealerweise in einem internationalen oder Finanzdienstleistungsumfeld.
- Fundierte Kenntnisse der internationalen Payroll-Prozesse und Compliance-Anforderungen (Steuern, Sozialversicherung, Arbeitsrecht) in mehreren Gerichtsbarkeiten.
- Erfahrung mit Payroll-Plattformen und HR-Systemen, mit starkem Fokus auf Datenqualität und Prozesszuverlässigkeit.
- Strukturierte, detailorientierte und hochzuverlässige Person, mit ausgeprägten organisatorischen Fähigkeiten und der Fähigkeit, mehrere Fristen in einem dynamischen und anspruchsvollen Umfeld zu managen.
- Komfortabel im Umgang mit regulierten und internationalen Kontexten, mit hohen Integritäts- und Diskrepanzen bei der Handhabung vertraulicher Daten.
- Internationale Denkweise und Erfahrung in multikulturellen Umgebungen.
- Ausgezeichnete zwischenmenschliche und kollaborative Fähigkeiten, mit proaktivem und positivem Auftreten, Energie und intellektueller Neugier.
- Starke Kommunikationsfähigkeiten, mit der Fähigkeit, klare Erklärungen für nicht‑spezialisierte Stakeholder zu geben und Kenntnisse der nationalen Sprachen, insbesondere Französisch und Italienisch, als großer Vorteil.

## Our Values
- Verantwortung : Übernahme von Aufgaben und Herausforderungen sowie kontinuierliche Verbesserung
- Hands‑On : Proaktivität, um schnell hochwertige Ergebnisse zu liefern
- Leidenschaftlich : Engagement und Streben nach Exzellenz
- Lösungsorientiert : Fokus auf Kundenergebnisse und faire Behandlung der Kunden mit einer risikobewussten Denkweise
- Partnerschaftsorientiert : Förderung von Zusammenarbeit und Teamarbeit. Gemeinsames Arbeiten mit unternehmerischem Geist.

## Please ensure to attach a cover letter to your CV when filling the application.
descriptionByLocale.fr:
Our Company EFG International est un groupe bancaire privé mondial, offrant des services de private banking et de gestion d'actifs. Nous servons des clients dans plus de 40 sites à travers le monde. EFG International propose un environnement de travail stimulant et dynamique et s'efforce d'être un employeur de choix. EFG s'engage à fournir un environnement de travail équitable et inclusif fondé sur le principe du respect mutuel. Rejoindre notre équipe signifie vivre un environnement de soutien, où vos contributions sont valorisées et reconnues. Nous croyons fermement que la diversité de nos équipes nous donne un avantage concurrentiel en favorisant une meilleure prise de décision et une plus grande innovation.

## Our Purpose and Mission Autonomiser les esprits entrepreneuriaux pour créer de la valeur – aujourd'hui et pour l'avenir. Nous sommes une banque privée, offrant des solutions personnalisées à l'échelle mondiale aux clients privés et institutionnels. Notre succès durable repose sur nos talents et sur la façon dont nous collaborons avec nos clients et nos communautés pour créer une valeur durable.

## Job Description Le International Payroll Specialist sera une ressource clé au sein d'une structure de paie mondiale en évolution. Le rôle assure un traitement précis des salaires, la pleine conformité aux réglementations locales et internationales, et une collaboration efficace avec les partenaires internes et externes pour garantir des opérations de paie efficaces et conformes. Ce poste se concentrera principalement sur les sites EFG hors Suisse et servira de point de contact principal pour les questions liées à la paie dans ces sites. En même temps, le rôle sera également impliqué dans les opérations de paie pour la Suisse, fournissant soutien et secours au besoin. Le rôle fournira des orientations sur les sujets de paie, y compris les allocations, les réglementations fiscales, la sécurité sociale et les exigences de reporting, soutenant l'organisation à maintenir des normes élevées de conformité et de qualité de service. Le rôle offre également l'opportunité de contribuer à la mise en œuvre d'une plateforme de paie mondiale pour les employés des sites internationaux EFG et de prendre progressivement la responsabilité des opérations de paie multi‑pays depuis la Suisse. C'est une excellente opportunité pour quelqu'un désireux de travailler dans une équipe RH internationale, rapide et orientée client au sein d'un groupe bancaire privé mondial.

## Main responsibilities
- Gérer le processus global de paie depuis la Suisse pour les sites internationaux sélectionnés, en assurant des paiements salariaux précis et ponctuels.
- Soutenir et servir de sauvegarde pour les activités de paie pour les employés basés en Suisse.
- Coordonner avec les prestataires locaux de paie, en garantissant la conformité aux taxes, à la sécurité sociale et aux réglementations du travail dans chaque juridiction.
- Collaborer avec RH et Finance pour aligner les processus, garantir des interfaces précises et résoudre les problèmes.
- Agir comme premier point de contact pour les questions des employés concernant la paie, fournir un soutien rapide et précis et maintenir une haute qualité des données à travers les sites.
- Préparer et examiner les rapports de paie (salaires, contributions, obligations fiscales) et soutenir les audits internes et externes avec la documentation requise.
- Piloter des initiatives pour revoir, rationaliser et centraliser les processus RH/paie à l'échelle mondiale, effectuer des contrôles réguliers sur les sorties de paie afin d'assurer qualité et conformité.

## Skills and Experience
- Expérience avérée dans la gestion de paie multi‑pays, idéalement dans un environnement international ou de services financiers.
- Solide connaissance des processus de paie internationaux et des exigences de conformité (impôts, sécurité sociale, droit du travail) dans plusieurs juridictions.
- Expérience avec des plateformes de paie et des systèmes RH, avec une forte attention à la qualité des données et à la fiabilité des processus.
- Structuré, orienté vers le détail et très fiable, avec de solides compétences organisationnelles et la capacité de gérer plusieurs échéances dans un environnement dynamique et exigeant.
- À l'aise dans un contexte réglementé et international, avec de hauts niveaux d'intégrité et de discrétion dans la manipulation de données confidentielles.
- Esprit international et expérience de travail dans des environnements multiculturels.
- Excellentes compétences interpersonnelles et de collaboration, avec une attitude proactive et positive, énergie et curiosité intellectuelle.
- Solides compétences en communication, avec la capacité de fournir des explications claires aux parties prenantes non spécialisées et la connaissance des langues nationales, en particulier le français et l'italien, comme atout majeur.

## Our Values
- Responsabilité : Prendre en charge les tâches et les défis, ainsi que rechercher une amélioration continue
- Hands‑On : Être proactif pour livrer rapidement des résultats de haute qualité
- Passionné : S'engager et viser l'excellence
- Axé sur la solution : Se concentrer sur les résultats clients et traiter les clients de manière équitable avec une mentalité consciente du risque
- Orienté partenariat : Promouvoir la collaboration et le travail d'équipe. Travailler ensemble avec un esprit entrepreneurial.

summary: The International Payroll Specialist will be a key resource within an evolving global payroll structure. The role ensures accurate salary processing, full compliance with local and international regulations, and effective collaboration with internal and external partners to guarantee efficient and compliant payroll operations.

This position will primarily focus on EFG locations outside Switzerland and will serve as the main point of contact for payroll‑related matters across these locations. At the same time, the role will also be involved in payroll operations for Switzerland, providing support and backup to the team as needed. This role will provide guidance on payroll topics, including allowances, tax regulations, social security and reporting requirements, supporting the organisation in maintaining high standards of compliance and service quality.

The role also offers the opportunity to contribute to the implementation of a global payroll platform for employees of EFG international locations and to progressively take ownership of multi‑country payroll operations from Switzerland
responsibilities: Manage the global payroll process from Switzerland for selected international locations, ensuring accurate and timely salary payments.
Support and act as backup for payroll activities for Switzerland‑based employees.
Coordinate with local payroll providers, ensuring compliance with tax, social security and labour regulations in each jurisdiction.
Collaborate with HR and Finance to align processes, ensure accurate interfaces and resolve issues.
Act as first point of contact for employee payroll queries, providing timely and accurate support and maintaining high data quality across locations.
Prepare and review payroll reports (salaries, contributions, tax obligations) and support internal and external audits with required documentation.
Drive initiatives to review, streamline and centralise HR/payroll processes globally, performing regular checks on payroll outputs to ensure quality and compliance.

jobs.title: Senior Cloud Engineer
jobs.description:
## Key Responsibilities

- Cloud & Infrastructure Design and Implementation

-   Design, build and deploy cloud, hybrid and on    ‑    premises solutions in line with the bank  ’  s IT strategy and architecture standards.

- Participate in the design and implementation of IT infrastructure projects related to systems (servers, storage, virtualization, desktops).

- Contribute to the definition and implementation of the technology direction, vision and strategy to enable and accelerate cloud technology adoption.

- M365 & Azure Engineering

- Act as a subject-matter expert for M365 (Exchange Online, Teams, SharePoint, OneDrive, security & compliance features, etc.) and contribute to Azure-based solutions.

- Lead or support application readiness assessments, environment design and configuration for M365 and Azure workloads.

- Perform prototyping of new environments, server builds and configuration to validate solutions before production rollout.

- Cloud Adoption & Optimization

- Drive and support cloud adoption initiatives, including:

- Application and infrastructure readiness assessments

- Data and workload migration to M365/Azure

- Performance tuning and optimization of cloud environments

- Ensure solutions are secure, resilient, scalable and compliant with banking and regulatory requirements.

- Automation & Operational Excellence

- Develop, enhance and maintain automation for infrastructure components (e.g. provisioning, configuration, monitoring, patching, lifecycle management).

- Contribute to the standardization and industrialization of infrastructure services and processes.

- Support continuous improvement of operational procedures, documentation and runbooks.

- Collaboration & Support

- Provide technical expertise and guidance to other IT support teams on all cloud topics (SaaS, PaaS, IaaS).

- Act as an escalation point for complex incidents and problems related to M365, Azure and hybrid infrastructure.

-   Collaborate closely with security, network, workplace and application teams to ensure end    ‑    to    ‑    end solution quality.

## Skills & Experience Required

- Senior experience in infrastructure / cloud engineering, with strong focus on M365 and good knowledge of Azure.

- Solid background with Windows Server, virtualization, networking and hybrid environments.

-   Hands    ‑    on experience with cloud migrations and optimization.

- Used to working in complex, regulated environments; financial services / banking experience is a plus.

-   Comfortable in a small, high    ‑    expertise team, with a proactive and collaborative mindset.

- English fluent (must); French is a plus.

-   Strong analytical and problem    ‑    solving skills, with a pragmatic and solution    ‑    oriented mindset.

-   Ability to communicate clearly with both technical and non    ‑    technical stakeholders.

- High level of ownership, reliability and integrity, aligned with the standards of a private banking environment.

- Entrepreneurial mindset: comfortable challenging the status quo, proposing improvements and driving change.

Our Values

-   Accountability    : Taking ownership for tasks and challenges, as well as seeking continuous improvement

-   Hands-on    : Being proactive to rapidly deliver high-quality results

-   Passionate    : Being committed and striving for excellence

-   Solution-driven    : Focusing on client outcomes and treating clients fairly with a risk-aware mindset

-   Partnership-oriented    : Promoting collaboration and teamwork. Working together with an entrepreneurial spirit.

## Please ensure to attach a cover letter to your CV when filling the application.

## Application

Should you wish to apply for this position use this link to apply.

jobs.title: Client Services Officer - Geneva Talent Pool
jobs.description:
## About EFG

EFG International is a global private banking group, serving clients in over 40 locations worldwide. As EFG continues to grow, we are building a talent pool for future Client Services Officer (CSO) positions in Geneva. Joining our talent pool means you will be among the first considered for upcoming opportunities, contributing to our dynamic and inclusive environment.

EFG is committed to equity, inclusion, and mutual respect. We value diversity as a driver of innovation and better decision-making, and we strive to be an employer of choice.

## Skills and Experience

- Minimum 5 years’ experience in a similar role within private banking or financial services.

- Strong understanding of private banking processes, financial products, and regulatory requirements (KYC, AML, FATCA, CRS).

- Excellent proficiency in English and French; additional languages are an asset.

- Proficient in standard IT systems; adaptable to new software.

- Service-oriented, client-focused mindset; strong team player.

- High level of confidentiality and discretion.

- Proactive, self-motivated, detail-oriented, and reliable.

- Open-minded and eager to learn.

## Our Values

-  Accountability:  Ownership and continuous improvement.

-  Hands-on:  Proactive delivery of high-quality results.

-  Passionate:  Commitment and pursuit of excellence.

-  Solution-driven:  Focus on client outcomes and fair treatment.

-  Partnership-oriented:  Collaboration and entrepreneurial spirit.

## Please ensure to attach a cover letter to your CV when filling the application.

## About EFG

EFG International is a global private banking group, serving clients in over 40 locations worldwide. As EFG continues to grow, we are building a talent pool for future Client Services Officer (CSO) positions in Geneva. Joining our talent pool means you will be among the first considered for upcoming opportunities, contributing to our dynamic and inclusive environment.

EFG is committed to equity, inclusion, and mutual respect. We value diversity as a driver of innovation and better decision-making, and we strive to be an employer of choice.

paragraphs: As part of our talent pool, your profile will be reviewed for a variety of CSO opportunities as they become available. The private banking market is dynamic, and the requirements for each role may shift in response to client needs, regulatory changes, or business priorities. jobs.title: Cybersecurity Internal Penetration Tester
jobs.description:
General Info

-
Department : Information Security & BCM

-
Work time Percentage : 100%

-
Location : Geneva (preferred), Zurich or Lugano

## Job Description

Context - The Information Security & BCM, under the lead of the Group Chief Information Security Officer (CISO) and part of the Chief Operating Officer (COO) organization, defines, leads, and coordinates information security efforts across EFG International and its entities globally. It outlines the information security strategy, identifies, and runs security initiatives and sets standards.

To support the ICT Risk Management Framework, in compliance with regulatory requirements (FINMA, DORA and relevant financial-sector regulations), we are looking for a Cybersecurity Intermal Penetration Tester.

The successful candidate will be responsible for performing ongoing, in-house offensive security assessments of the Bank’s infrastructure, applications and controls.

This role combines hands-on technical experience conducting penetration testing and simulating real-world attacks exercises on corporate environments, with close collaboration with Security, IT, development and risk teams to proactively identify, exploit and advise on the remediation of vulnerabilities in critical banking systems.

## Key responsibilities include

-
Plan, scope and execute internal penetration tests on core banking platforms and business applications, with a strong focus on services supporting critical and important functions

-
Design test scenarios aligned with realistic baking threat models (fraud, data exfiltration, privilege escalation, lateral movements to critical systems,…) and internal risk assessments

-
Execute hands-on tests against internal networks, servers, endpoints, web applications, APIs, cloud workloads, AD and other core infrastructure systems

-
Document findings in clear, risk-based reports with evidence and actionable remediation guidance for technical and non-technical audiences

-
Work closely with infrastructure, development, DevOps and risk teams to support remediation plans and re-testing, ensuring critical findings are tracked to closure within the ICT risk and governance processes.

-
Develop and maintain internal testing methodologies, playbooks and tools to support repeatable and efficient assessments

-
Collaborate with SOC on purple-team style exercises to test and improve detection and response capabilities

-
Stay current on emerging threats, vulnerabilities, TTPs, etc, and incorporate into internal testing

## Skills and experience

-
Background in cybersecurity, computer science, or related fields

-
3-5 years of hands-on penetration testing or red-team experience, with demonstrable work on internal network, web applications and API; banking or financial services experience is a strong plus

-
Strong understanding of network protocols, operating systems (Windows, Linux), web and cloud technologies; familiarity with core banking architectures is a plus

-
Proficiency with common offensive tools and techniques (e.g. Burp Suite, Metasploit, Cobalt Strike-like frameworks, Kali-based tooling) and ability to perform manual testing beyond tools

-
Solid knowledge of secure coding concepts and common application vulnerabilities (e.g. OWASP Top 10) to assess web and API targets

-
Professional certifications such as OCSP, GXPN, or similar offensive security credentials in good standing

-
Strong communication skills and ability to explain complex technical findings to technical and non-technical audience

## Our Values

-
Accountability : Taking ownership for tasks and challenges, as well as seeking continuous improvement

-
Hands-on : Being proactive to rapidly deliver high-quality results

-
Passionate : Being committed and striving for excellence

-
Solution-driven : Focusing on client outcomes and treating clients fairly with a risk-aware mindset

-
Partnership-oriented : Promoting collaboration and teamwork. Working together with an entrepreneurial spirit.

## Application

Please ensure to attach a cover letter to your CV when filling the application.

Our Company

EFG International is a global private banking group, offering private banking and asset management services. We serve clients in over 40 locations worldwide. EFG International offers a stimulating and dynamic work environment and strives to be an employer of choice.

EFG is committed to providing an equitable and inclusive working environment that is founded on the principle of mutual respect. Joining our team means experiencing a supportive environment, where your contributions are valued and recognised. We strongly believe that the diversity of our teams gives us a competitive advantage by fostering better decision-making and greater innovation.

Our Purpose and Mission

Empowering entrepreneurial minds to create value – today and for the future.

We are a private bank, offering personalised solutions on a global scale to private and institutional clients. Our sustainable success is based on our talents and on how we partner with our clients and communities to create lasting value.

jobs.title: Operational Risk Analyst
jobs.description:
## Job Description

The position of Operational Risk Analyst sits within the Operational Risk function and focuses on strengthening the bank’s risk management and internal control framework globally. Acting as a key risk partner to the first line of defence, the position provides independent challenge and oversight on operational risks, ensuring that processes, systems and activities are managed in line with the bank’s risk appetite.

 Location: Lugano, Zurich, Geneva.

  Main responsibilities

-  Oversee the effective and consistent implementation and maintenance of the risk and control management framework globally.

-  Contribute to thematic risk and control assessments on a broad range of issues, including back and middle-office, funds, securities, payments, corporate actions, and order execution through collaboration with other stakeholders.

-  Perform process-level walkthroughs and control testing to enable the identification and assessment of risks and controls.

-  Proactively escalate and effectively communicate material control weaknesses, closely collaborate with key stakeholders in the relevant functions to define appropriate action plans and oversee their timely implementation.

-  Provide expertise and make recommendations for improvements to steer adherence to internal regulations, regulatory requirements and industry best practices.
   Skills and experience

-  Master’s degree in Business Administration, Economics, or a technical field (Science, Technology, Engineering, Mathematics).

-  At least 5 to 7 years of experience in the banking sector (ideally in Risk Control, Audit, or Business Risk Management), or in consulting/audit with a leading professional services firm; a combination of both is considered an advantage.

-  Strong understanding of banking processes and systems, products, and related regulatory requirements. Expertise with core banking systems and Front systems is a plus.

-  Excellent communication skills in English, both verbal and written. Knowledge of German, French, or Italian is a plus.

-  Proven ability to write reports and communicate effectively with a senior audience.

-  Self-motivated, diligent, highly organized, able to prioritize and multi-task, and thrive in a fast-paced environment.

-  Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills, able to work autonomously and as part of a global team.

-  Innovative mindset, with the ability to identify opportunities for process improvement and operational efficiency.
   Our Values

  Accountability : Taking ownership for tasks and challenges, as well as seeking continuous improvement

  Hands-on : Being proactive to rapidly deliver high-quality results

  Passionate : Being committed and striving for excellence

  Solution-driven : Focusing on client outcomes and treating clients fairly with a risk-aware mindset

  Partnership-oriented : Promoting collaboration and teamwork. Working together with an entrepreneurial spirit.
